title: Combat Toggle
description: Allows players to toggle on and off their PvP-allowed status.
body:
Lets players run `/ctoggle` to (dis)allow themselves from being targetted and damaged by player-versus-player combat. Admins can additionally forcetoggle a player's state.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5417699dd308150b5317535a66d853a00b4a9e3.png)
